mapper.select: WITH MENU_LAYER (USER_ID, MENU_ID, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, DISPORDER) AS ( SELECT G.USER_ID, G.MENU_ID, G.CREATE_USER, G.CREATE_TIME, G.UPDATE_USER, G.UPDATE_TIME, M.DISPORDER FROM TB_MED_GOV_MENU_NEW G INNER JOIN TB_MED_MENU_NEW M ON G.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID WHERE G.USER_ID = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT NULL, M.PARENT_MENU_ID, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL FROM TB_MED_MENU_NEW M INNER JOIN MENU_LAYER L ON M.PARENT_MENU_ID IS NOT NULL AND M.MENU_ID = L.MENU_ID ) SELECT DISTINCT * FROM MENU_LAYER ORDER BY DISPORDER
mapper.insert: INSER INTO TB_MED_GOV_MENU VALUES ( USER_ID = #{medGovMenu.userId}, MENU_ID = #{medGovMenu.menuId}, CREATE_USER = #{medGovMenu.createUser}, CREATE_TIME = SYSDATE UPTIMESTAMP_USER = #{medGovMenu.uptimestampUser}, )
